title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms Digital Technologies family as a Marketplace Manager in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms Digital Technologies:
OYO Rooms Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
